top_signals.title: A Stock Trader’s Guide to the Start of ECB Interest Rate Hikes
top_signals.summary: European stock traders will need to add a further variable to their investment strategies this week: how rising interest rates will affect each corner of the market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US forces board sanctioned tanker in Indian Ocean, Pentagon says
top_signals.summary: U.S. forces have intercepted multiple commercial and oil tankers in the Indian Ocean in recent months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: World’s Hottest Market Has Korea Bulls Reaching for Protection
top_signals.summary: A wave of optimism over South Korean stocks is giving way to growing caution, as some investors hedge positions and pare back crowded trades on concerns that the rally has run too hot, too fast.

top_signals.title: Apple removes Russia’s state-backed messaging app Max from its store
top_signals.summary: Russian authorities have promoted Max as a domestic alternative to foreign messaging platforms such as Telegram and WhatsApp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: DAZN forgoes World Cup broadcast exclusivity to expand reach in Japan
